description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for cert-manager, tracking certificate lifecycle, issuance, renewal, errors, resource usage, and API metrics.
title: Cert-Manager Dashboard

adbb026b-861a-4dab-a850-b2fbdeef94d2.description: Kubernetes namespace where cert-manager is deployed
adbb026b-861a-4dab-a850-b2fbdeef94d2.name: namespace
adbb026b-861a-4dab-a850-b2fbdeef94d2.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'namespace') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'certmanager_certificate_ready_status'

cd4a5f93-7484-4309-a58f-c5a5f3b77a83.name: issuer
cd4a5f93-7484-4309-a58f-c5a5f3b77a83.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'issuer_name') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'certmanager_certificate_ready_status'

875c94d3-53ea-40de-93bb-6934227545ce.description: Specific certificate name to filter metrics
875c94d3-53ea-40de-93bb-6934227545ce.name: certificate_name
875c94d3-53ea-40de-93bb-6934227545ce.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'name') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'certmanager_certificate_ready_status'

b7bc91cd-05a9-4cf4-af51-0bc308d5fb58.description: Kubernetes cluster name for multi-cluster setups
b7bc91cd-05a9-4cf4-af51-0bc308d5fb58.name: cluster
b7bc91cd-05a9-4cf4-af51-0bc308d5fb58.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'k8s_cluster_name') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name LIKE 'certmanager%'

7aa49b1b-cace-458f-a67a-97e7d54b5195.name: deployment_environment
7aa49b1b-cace-458f-a67a-97e7d54b5195.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment_environment') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name LIKE 'certmanager%'

widgets.description: High-level metrics providing an overview of cert-manager's health and performance
widgets.title: General Overview

widgets.description: Total number of certificates managed by cert-manager across all states
widgets.title: Total Certificates

widgets.description: Number of certificates currently in Ready state
widgets.title: Active Certificates

widgets.description: Total number of controller sync calls processed in the selected time range
widgets.title: Certificate Requests

widgets.description: Total uptime of cert-manager since the last restart
widgets.title: Uptime

widgets.description: Metrics related to the issuance of certificates by cert-manager
widgets.title: Certificate Issuance

widgets.description: Number of certificates issued by each configured issuer
widgets.title: Certificates Issued per Issuer

widgets.description: Rate at which certificates are being issued over time
widgets.title: Issuance Rate

widgets.description: Percentage of successful certificate issuances versus failed attempts
widgets.title: Issuance Success Rate

widgets.description: Metrics related to the renewal process of certificates managed by cert-manager
widgets.title: Certificate Renewal

widgets.description: Number of certificates not in Ready state, potentially pending renewal or re-issuance
widgets.title: Certificates Pending Renewal

widgets.description: Percentage of successful renewals versus failed renewal attempts
widgets.title: Renewal Success Rate

widgets.description: Average time taken for ACME client requests, indicating certificate renewal duration
widgets.title: Renewal Duration

widgets.description: Metrics related to errors and failures within cert-manager operations
widgets.title: Error Metrics

widgets.description: Rate of errors encountered during the certificate issuance process
widgets.title: Certificate Issuance Errors

widgets.description: Rate of errors that occurred during the certificate renewal process
widgets.title: Renewal Errors

widgets.description: Rate of ACME API requests with error HTTP status codes (4xx/5xx)
widgets.title: API Server Errors

widgets.description: Metrics related to the resource consumption of cert-manager
widgets.title: Resource Usage

widgets.description: CPU usage by the cert-manager pods, indicating the processing load
widgets.title: CPU Usage

widgets.description: Memory consumption of the cert-manager process
widgets.title: Memory Usage

widgets.description: Current depth of cert-manager work queues, spikes may indicate processing backlogs or stability issues
widgets.title: Workqueue Depth

widgets.description: Metrics related to API requests and events handled by cert-manager
widgets.title: API and Event Metrics

widgets.description: Rate of HTTP ACME API requests processed by cert-manager over time
widgets.title: API Request Rate

widgets.description: Rate of events being added to cert-manager work queues, indicating responsiveness to cluster changes
widgets.title: Event Processing Rate

widgets.description: Number of failed ACME API requests, helping identify communication issues
widgets.title: Failed API Requests
